completed_packets.summary: Evidence bundles now require matched harness manifest/result lineage and gate summaries before downstream Eval or Governance handoff.
completed_packets.title: Bind live harness outputs into evidence handoffs

verification.command: python3.11 -m py_compile flightrecorder/bundle.py flightrecorder/cli.py flightrecorder/validation.py tests/test_evidence_bundle.py tests/test_schema_registry.py

completed_packets.summary: The release gate now exports harness schemas, generates and validates a mock harness pair, requires it in evidence_bundle_full.json, and asserts harness handoff metrics plus installed CLI help flags.
completed_packets.title: Adopt required harness handoff in release evidence checks

evidence.summary: Harness manifest/result evidence is schema-checkable, evidence bundles fail closed when required harness lineage or gate summaries are missing, and release_check exercises the required mock handoff.

next_packets.summary: Add or adopt a canonical harness publisher on this branch so required handoff pairs come from actual scenario runs instead of the release-check mock fixture.
next_packets.title: Publish real harness run manifests and results for evidence handoff

risks: Real live provider harness capture was not run; this packet validates handoff artifact contracts and bundle gating only.
This dedicated worktree did not initially contain the larger autonomy docs/state from the shared checkout, so concise Goal 1 local docs and a fresh supervisor state were created here.
